nasb.text: If only you had paid attention to My commandments! Then your well-being would have been like a river, And your righteousness like the waves of the sea.

esv.text: Oh that you had paid attention to my commandments! Then your peace would have been like a river, and your righteousness like the waves of the sea;

cnv.text: 但願你一向都留心聽從我的命令， 這樣你的平安就像河水滔滔， 你的公義就如海浪滾滾；

ccb.text: 真希望你当时肯听我的命令！ 那样，你的平安必像滚滚河水， 你的公义必如滔滔海浪；

csbs.text: 但愿你一向听从我的命令， 你的平安就会如江河， 你的公义就会如海涛，
